title: crusea coccinea subsp. chiriquensis
intro: Crusea coccinea subsp. chiriquensis, also known as Chiriqui red crusea, is a plant species native to Panama. It belongs to the family Rubiaceae and is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Traditionally, it is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in modern medicine.
